title: How a Godly Man Audits Himself Before He Audits Everyone Else
caption:
A godly man is slower to point and faster to kneel.

Matthew 7 named the log in your own eye first for a reason. It's easier to spot the mess in someone else's life than to run the same audit on your own. The friend who's always late. The guy who drops the ball. Easy to catalogue. Harder to ask what you drop that nobody tracks as closely.

Galatians 6:1 doesn't say skip the correction. It says restore him gently, watching yourself so you're not tempted the same way. Gently isn't a mood you perform. It's what you owe a man once you remember how much grace it took to get you here.

Confess yours before you name his. The brother who leads with "I've failed at this too" earns the right to speak into it. The one who skips that step just sounds superior.

Hard on yourself, gentle with him. Most men have it backwards.

#faith #humility #christianmen #manofgod #character #realtalk
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
